[User] You are the evaluator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced JSON code block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be append_mailbox_message and the payload must match exactly:
```json
{
  "kind": "append_mailbox_message",
  "payload": {
    "fromActor": {
      "kind": "role",
      "role": "evaluator"
    },
    "toActor": {
      "kind": "manager"
    },
    "kind": "final",
    "body": "Artifact reviewed. Ready to complete the run."
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "append_mailbox_message",
  "payload": {
    "fromActor": {
      "kind": "role",
      "role": "evaluator"
    },
    "toActor": {
      "kind": "manager"
    },
    "kind": "final",
    "body": "Artifact reviewed. Ready to complete the run."
  }
}
```
